message:
feat(config): wire SemanticConfig into search pipeline (bd-27k)

The SemanticConfig (model, dimensions, reranker, rerank) was loaded from
config.toml and env vars but never used in the search pipeline. The
search code only checked CLI --model flag, falling back to the hardcoded
FastEmbedder.

Now both Semantic and Hybrid search modes resolve the effective model
using: CLI flag > config file/env > FastEmbedder > hash fallback. This
enables users to set persistent model preferences via config.toml or
XF_MODEL/XF_DIMS/XF_RERANKER environment variables.

Added SemanticConfig helper methods:
- effective_model(): resolves model with CLI > config priority
- effective_dimensions(): resolves dims with CLI > config priority
- effective_reranker(): resolves reranker with CLI > config priority
- is_rerank_enabled(): checks if reranking is on via CLI or config

Added 11 unit tests for config resolution, TOML roundtrip, partial
TOML parsing, merge behavior, and priority ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
